# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 bullets about what this PR changes. -->

## Type

- [ ] feat — user-visible feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — tooling, deps, tests
- [ ] docs — documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Maestro flow added or updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] No new `any` casts without a comment
- [ ] No "preview"/"coming soon" copy on shipped surfaces
